title: Use LLM-extracted evidence flags from feedback comments for deterministic misclassification triage

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementing now: add per-item LLM evidence-flag extraction (including feedback edit comment signals like transcript omissions/policy ambiguity), feed those flags into deterministic category assignment, persist flags in item_classifications_all, and validate with tests + 50-sample runtime eval.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Implemented LLM evidence-flag extraction for misclassification triage and wired it into deterministic category assignment.

### What changed
- Added `extract_misclassification_evidence_flags(item_context=...)` in `plexus/rca_analysis.py`.
  - Extracts explicit item-level flags from full context (including feedback edit comments):
    - `external_information_missing_or_degraded`
    - `guideline_or_policy_ambiguity`
    - `missing_required_context_due_system`
    - `runtime_or_parsing_failure`
    - `invalid_output_class_signal`
  - Also returns `best_evidence_source` and `best_evidence_quote`.
- Updated `classify_misclassification_item(...)` to require evidence flags and combine them with strict structural signals in a deterministic decision path.
  - Mechanical still takes precedence when system/pipeline/runtime/context-contract issues are present.
  - Information-gap and guideline-gap can now be driven by edit-comment-derived LLM signals.
- Persisted `triage_evidence_flags` in `item_classifications_all` rows for agent/operator visibility.
- Updated summary aggregation diagnostics to account for `triage_evidence_flags` signals (not just primary-input availability heuristics).
- Updated explainer prompt copy to avoid confusing "deterministic classification" phrasing; now uses "assigned category decision" wording.
- Wired extraction in both RCA paths in `plexus/Evaluation.py`:
  - full semantic RCA candidate pass
  - small-set RCA path

### Validation
- Tests:
  - `pytest -q plexus/rca_analysis_test.py plexus/Evaluation_feedback_test.py` => pass
  - `pytest -q plexus/Evaluation_feedback_test.py plexus/rca_analysis_test.py MCP/shared/analysis_test.py` => pass
- Runtime eval (50 samples): `c31ab1ed-4369-466c-8b73-58926096e946` completed.
  - `item_classifications_all` rows: 17
  - category counts: 16 `score_configuration_problem`, 1 `information_gap`
  - true flag counts included `external_information_missing_or_degraded: 1`
  - example item with that flag classified as `information_gap`.
